race.comment: PONY SOPRANO (5) consistent gelding who will find this more to his liking. Set a strong clip early before he faded in the straight to run ninth over 1400m at Scone in the Northern Wild Card. Capable of finding the winners' list. FULL REGALIA (11) improving gelding who looks destined for this class and better. Eye-catching return with a gritty on-pace head second over 1250m at Taree. Wining rider goes back on and can surprise some of his more fancied rivals.  Last start winner PRESSALONG (10) should also be included as should STARZAM (2) who will be fitter for two runs back from a spell, the latest effort a sixth over 1175m at this track.
